description_long: This object is a boxed set of six books, each with a distinctively colored spine, arranged neatly within a matte black slipcase. The front of the slipcase features a minimalist illustration of a wooden chair rendered in a subtle, slightly glossy finish. The spines of the books display the author's name, Thich Nhat Hanh, and the titles in a vertical orientation, with each book in a different color: red, green, blue, purple, light blue, and white. The back of the slipcase is plain black, while the back cover of the last book is visible, showing a block of text and a small publisher logo. The books appear to be standard paperback size, with visible white pages and colored covers. The overall presentation is clean, modern, and visually organized, suitable for display or personal use.
description: A boxed set of six colorful books by Thich Nhat Hanh in a matte black slipcase with a minimalist chair illustration. Each book has a distinct spine color and clear titling.
description_view_0: The front of the slipcase is visible, featuring a minimalist chair illustration and the colored edges of the book spines.
description_view_1: The side view shows the black slipcase spine with vertical silver text and the thickness of the set.
description_view_2: The back of the slipcase is plain black, with the back cover of the last book showing text and a small logo.
description_view_3: The spines of all six books are visible, each in a different color with vertical text, and the slipcase is seen from above.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover of the slipcase features a simple, minimalist line drawing of a wooden chair, rendered in a subtle, slightly glossy finish against a matte black background. No other imagery or decorative elements are present.
attribute_spine_design: The spines of the individual books are each a different solid color with vertical black or white text displaying the author's name and book title. The slipcase spine is black with vertical silver text and no additional decoration.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small, circular publisher logo is visible on the back cover of the last book and at the bottom of each book spine, featuring a geometric design.
